def get_user_data(user_id):
    # Violation: repeatedly building anonymous dictionaries with the same shape instead of using a class or TypedDict
    return {"id": user_id, "name": "John", "active": True, "role": "user"}

def get_admin_data(admin_id):
    return {"id": admin_id, "name": "Jane", "active": True, "role": "admin"}
